judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent limited its data retrieval to only the first 200 reviews and first 500 books (via query_db with LIMIT 200/500) and then computed averages from this incomplete subset, leading to missing and incorrect titles.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving Children's Books book_ids from books_database (call_BoI9xVzyyu3gJh1x1pghZWKZ), the agent queried review_database using a direct purchase_id IN (book_id list) filter (call_Hrkom162CcbjO1OEymmqEY8I), but because purchase_id and book_id require fuzzy/normalized matching, this incorrect join implementation returned an empty set and led to the wrong "No books found" answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly computed and joined the eligible books (query_db → execute_python), but in the final return_answer it manually altered some title strings and added extra metadata (e.g., dropping "(Paperback/Revised)" and "(8)"), causing mismatches with the ground-truth titles.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the result using only truncated datasets—querying both reviews and books with LIMIT 1000 (call_1FcBgCKDIm7pwEtxeM28e23N and call_17MEPLWTrGD9QV5OvoSDLmmZ) and then aggregating on this partial data in call_YFn88MiESI0z3qewSVOC03cb—so the final list missed and misincluded titles compared to the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no

FM3: no
FM4: no
